description:
Offered: Spring
This is an introductory course in information technology (IT) security with managerial, criminal justice, and IT components. This course focuses on management, legal issues, and implications related to securing corporate information systems, including security threats, security management processes, compliance laws and regulations, risk analysis and response, network and e-commerce security, and disaster recovery. Cross-listed with BSAD 3040 and CSC 3040
Prerequisite(s): BSAD 1700 or CSC 1500
